sizing_rule.note: Adjust position sizes daily using previous day's closing price HPR data (or trade-by-trade basis). Input daily HPRs into optimal f calculation to maximize geometric mean and portfolio growth. Reference: 50,000/(5,000/0.1) = 1 unit sizing formula.

source_rule_text: Adjust position sizes on a daily basis using the previous day's closing price, or on a trade-by-trade basis in practice, based on daily HPRs (Holding Period Returns) to maximize geometric mean and portfolio growth.
